title: John Swinney would 'consider' Prestwick Airport ban for US military planes

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: John Swinney would 'consider' Prestwick Airport ban for US military planes. US military aircraft could be banned from using Prestwick Airport by First Minister John Swinney if it was confirmed they were involved in...

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – John Swinney would 'consider' Prestwick Airport ban for US military planes
